chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S- 59 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA 4046/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 14.10.2025. None present for the appellant. There is also no intimation. Same was the position on the last three dates of hearing. It appears that the appellant has lost her interest in pursuing this Criminal Acquittal Appeal which is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Tufail
